news.title:
GMDC shares surged 18.2% to a 52-week high of ₹736, driven by metal sector rally.
Hindalco, Vedanta, Hindustan Zinc, and others gained 2-3%, boosting overall sentiment.
news.summary:
GMDC shares surged 18.2% to a 52-week high of ₹736, driven by metal sector rally.
Hindalco, Vedanta, Hindustan Zinc, and others gained 2-3%, boosting overall sentiment.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc secures top bid for Rajasthan mineral block.
Content is a brief update, no journalist analysis or commentary.
news.summary:

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc wins Jhandawali Satipura block in Rajasthan with final price offer of 3.05.
Block spans 1841.22 hectares at G3 exploration level, containing Potash and Halite minerals.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc wins Jhandawali Satipura block in Rajasthan with final price offer of 3.05.
Block spans 1841.22 hectares at G3 exploration level, containing Potash and Halite minerals.

news.title:
Experts advise holding Hindustan Zinc (Rs 533.45) with a target of Rs 670-700 due to strong momentum and valuations.
Ola Electric (Rs 29.18) and Brainbees Solutions (Rs 244.33) flagged for high valuations; NTPC Green Energy (Rs 97.07) holds long-term growth potential.
news.summary:
Experts advise holding Hindustan Zinc (Rs 533.45) with a target of Rs 670-700 due to strong momentum and valuations.
Ola Electric (Rs 29.18) and Brainbees Solutions (Rs 244.33) flagged for high valuations; NTPC Green Energy (Rs 97.07) holds long-term growth potential.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc reports record 4QFY26 mined metal production at 315 kt; FY26 total at 1114 kt.
Refined zinc rose 3% YoY to 851 kt; lead and silver production fell 13% and 9% YoY respectively.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc reports record 4QFY26 mined metal production at 315 kt; FY26 total at 1114 kt.
Refined zinc rose 3% YoY to 851 kt; lead and silver production fell 13% and 9% YoY respectively.

news.title:
Osho Krishan of Angel One recommends buying Hindustan Zinc and Chennai Petroleum shares based on technical indicators and favorable setups.
Nifty 50 and Sensex declined on April 2 due to global tensions; FPIs sold ₹83.3B, while DIIs bought ₹71.7B.
news.summary:
Osho Krishan of Angel One recommends buying Hindustan Zinc and Chennai Petroleum shares based on technical indicators and favorable setups.
Nifty 50 and Sensex declined on April 2 due to global tensions; FPIs sold ₹83.3B, while DIIs bought ₹71.7B.

news.title:
Power Mech secures ₹109.2 cr order from Hindustan Zinc, boosting shares 8% to ₹1,867.5 intraday high.
Despite gains, stock is down 25% YTD; recent wins include ₹709.6 cr Adani, ₹1,005 cr Mirzapur/Mahan contracts.
news.summary:
Power Mech secures ₹109.2 cr order from Hindustan Zinc, boosting shares 8% to ₹1,867.5 intraday high.
Despite gains, stock is down 25% YTD; recent wins include ₹709.6 cr Adani, ₹1,005 cr Mirzapur/Mahan contracts.

news.title: Power Mech wins ₹109 crore contract from HindZinc for 91.5 MW plant.
news.summary: Power Mech wins ₹109 crore contract from HindZinc for 91.5 MW plant.

news.title:
Silver ETFs rose 5.5%, Hindustan Zinc gained 3.5% as silver surged 4%.
Nippon India Silver ETF traded 5% higher, Groww and Zerodha ETFs up 5.5%.
news.summary:
Silver ETFs rose 5.5%, Hindustan Zinc gained 3.5% as silver surged 4%.
Nippon India Silver ETF traded 5% higher, Groww and Zerodha ETFs up 5.5%.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc shares fell 6% amid market sell-off and declining silver prices, trading at ₹489.80, down 4.85%.
Hindustan Zinc partners with Tata Steel to expand EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc solution, promoting sustainable steel manufacturing.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc shares fell 6% amid market sell-off and declining silver prices, trading at ₹489.80, down 4.85%.
Hindustan Zinc partners with Tata Steel to expand EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc solution, promoting sustainable steel manufacturing.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel partner to use EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc product, to cut emissions in steel manufacturing.
EcoZen reduces emissions by 75% vs global zinc average; Hindustan Zinc shares down 5%, Tata Steel down 4.4% on Monday.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel partner to use EcoZen, a low-carbon zinc product, to cut emissions in steel manufacturing.
EcoZen reduces emissions by 75% vs global zinc average; Hindustan Zinc shares down 5%, Tata Steel down 4.4% on Monday.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc and Cairn Oil & Gas plan ₹1 lakh crore investment in Rajasthan.
Vedanta units contributed nearly ₹3 lakh crore to exchequers in the past decade.
news.summary:

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc Ltd surged 3.4% on 20 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 523.75 intraday.
The stock outperformed the Non Ferrous Metals sector and Sensex after 2-day decline.
news.summary:
Hindustan Zinc Ltd surged 3.4% on 20 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 523.75 intraday.

news.title:
Metal stocks like NALCO, Hindustan Zinc, and Tata Steel nosedived due to weak global cues and gas supply concerns.
Sensex dropped over 900 points, Nifty fell 300 points, marking a third consecutive session of losses.
news.summary:

The collaboration aims to boost production and promote sustainability in zinc alloy sector.

news.title:
Govt exempts recycling of tailings in mines from fresh EC, easing regulations.
Hindustan Zinc may benefit as mining firms can reuse tailings without new EC.

The hub ensures raw material supply and long-term purchase agreements.

news.title:
Hindustan Zinc Ltd announced an analyst/investor meet under SEBI Regulation 30.
The meet, part of Kotak Securities' conference, is scheduled for Feb 25, 2026, in Mumbai.
